hero.description: Dedicated Flutter Developer with 2+ years of experience building scalable, high-performance mobile applications. Focused on Clean Architecture, solid application logic, and delivering real value through quality mobile solutions.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: Dedicated Flutter Developer with 2+ years of experience in building scalable, high-performance mobile applications.
about.p2: Backed by a strong foundation in Python for backend development, I specialize in implementing Clean Architecture principles to create robust, maintainable systems. I am proficient in designing fluid, user-centric interfaces and developing solid application logic.
about.p3: My focus is on delivering high-quality mobile solutions that meet user needs, generate real value, and drive tangible impact.

job1.r1: Designed cross-platform Flutter app with Clean Architecture & Provider
job1.r2: Integrated AI/ML models and IoT sensors (GPS, accelerometer, gyroscope, Bluetooth)
job1.r3: Built real-time Google Maps visualization for disaster rescue coordination
job1.r4: Implemented background services, push notifications, and role-based access control
job1.r6: CSV/Excel data export for sensor-based analytics

job2.r1: Developed biometric identity verification systems using Flutter & FastAPI
job2.r2: Integrated NFC and MRZ scanning for secure document reading
job2.r3: Implemented Firebase authentication and real-time data storage
job2.r4: API integration for face recognition and backend communication
job2.r5: Managed complex state with BLoC and Provider patterns

edu1.note: Research focus: AI integration with IoT for intelligent mobile systems

edu2.note: Graduated with Honours — GPA 3.42/4.00. Thesis: AI-supported financial system for visually impaired people.

edu3.note: 1-year scholarship — Machine learning, computer vision & AI-driven mobile development.

p1.title: TurVia — Smart Tourism & Navigation
p1.description: A comprehensive tourism app featuring smart routing, real-time recommendations, personalized trip planning, and a tour management system with secure in-app payments (iyzico/Stripe) and real-time operational workflows.

p2.title: KURTAR — IoT & AI Disaster Platform
p2.description: A disaster response mobile app providing real-time decision support via IoT, mobile sensors, and AI. Features BLE-based E2EE group chat, GPS/magnetometer localization, background services, and multi-threaded data processing.

p3.title: Kurtar Saha — Field Data & AI Suite
p3.description: An integrated ecosystem of two Flutter apps for seismic research: a field data acquisition tool with high-frequency sensor logging and precision Hz sampling, plus an AI inference app for real-time model validation via WebSocket.

p4.title: DigiVis — Digital Onboarding & KYC
p4.description: A secure digital onboarding SDK for iOS & Android with high-fidelity camera capture, Liveness Detection, Face Matching algorithms, NFC/MRZ document reading, and a centralized dashboard for real-time administrative oversight.

p5.title: IbanVault — Secure IBAN Manager
p5.description: Offline-first Flutter app for encrypted IBAN storage with QR code generation & scanning, multi-language support (EN/TR/AR), RTL-aware layouts, and AES-encrypted local database. Clean MVC architecture with Provider.

p6.title: Vakit — Smart Prayer Times App
p6.description: A multilingual Islamic prayer times app with GPS-based & manual city selection, 3 saved cities, timely local notifications, customizable reminders, and RTL-aware UI available in Turkish, English, and Arabic.

p7.title: LenDeX — Smart Lending UI
p7.description: A high-fidelity Flutter UI kit for personal budgeting and micro-lending app designs. Featuring pixel-perfect layouts, responsive dashboard components, interactive charts, and smooth animation transitions.

p8.title: AI Financial — Visually Impaired (Thesis)
p8.description: Undergraduate graduation thesis awarded with Honours. A YOLOv5-powered mobile app providing real-time money recognition and full financial management for visually impaired users, backed by Firebase and intelligent accessibility design.

p9.title: NetGuard — LAN Security Analyzer
p9.description: A Flutter app for non-intrusive LAN network analysis and connected device discovery. Uses an Evidence Scoring engine that combines open ports, response time, and MAC address data to classify devices by risk level. Built with Clean Architecture, MVVM (Provider), and Dart Isolates for parallel scanning without blocking the UI.

s1.title: Flutter Mobile Development
s1.description: Advanced cross-platform iOS & Android apps with Flutter. Clean Architecture, real-time data, beautiful UIs.

s2.title: AI & IoT Integration
s2.description: Intelligent mobile systems powered by machine learning and IoT device integration for real-world impact.

s3.title: Backend API Development
s3.description: Scalable, high-performance backend APIs and databases that power mobile and web applications.
